item.woh.ancient_gold.tooltip: An ancient piece of gold that seems to be incredibly strong.. This is unusual for gold?
item.woh.arbiters_blade.tooltip: A Mysterious And Ancient Blade That Seems to Hold Some Sort Of Hidden Power.. Or even. Courage?
item.woh.arbiters_shield.tooltip: An Extremely Durable Metal Shield, the metal used in the shield seems unworldly?
item.woh.folded_iron.tooltip:
A piece of iron that with much higher density than regular iron.
Although tough, it tends to be fragile without being smelted first
item.woh.folded_steel.tooltip: A very dense piece of steel
item.woh.hardened_steel_ingot.tooltip:
An extremely durable and hard metal
that can be used to craft weapons of great variety
item.woh.odachi.tooltip: A large, one sided greatsword that is slow but powerful
item.woh.shotogatana.tooltip:
A precise blade paired with a siya.
  nimble and capable of cutting through the toughest of armor with style
item.woh.tenrai.tooltip:
This Ancient Weapon known as the Tenrai, is a double bladed staff-sword-hybrid.

Designed by ancient technologically advanced monks, this weapon is not only agile but can be split
in half to be used as dual swords, one for each hand.
item.woh.tessen.tooltip:
A nimble war fan that strikes with quick precision.
this mighty weapon is able to be thrown when holding down aim(Right Click), allowing for ranged attacks
item.woh.tsume.tooltip: A pair of sharp claws designed with close range swiping attacks in mind.
item.woh.wakizashi.tooltip: A short and nimble, one sided blade that is capable of being dual wielded
skill.woh.arbiters_slash.tooltip:
This blade is seemingly normal on the surface..
However when tilted towards the sky, it becomes filled with magical energy...
Once fully charged the sword becomes capable of slashing powerful spinning cutters as great speed with each strike!
skill.woh.enraged_claws.tooltip:
These pair of claws are not only powerful, but are capable of extreme agility,
And so when your innate ability is active, you become enraged and are able to attack with extreme swiftness.
skill.woh.katajutsu.tooltip:
This fighting form is a long lost technique used by ancient monks.
 Once learned, you are no longer defenceless when without your weapon, your vicious kicks and punches can do the work for you.
skill.woh.shotogatana_two_hand_stance.to:
Once the cooldown is charged, you can unsheathe your weapon and you
will have a completely new moveset, performing two-handed slashes
skill.woh.throw_stance.tooltip:
Being a light and agile weapon, they are able to be thrown while holding down (Right Click).
Your moveset will be changed depending on whether or not you have another fan blade in the offhand.
